# RightSpend.ai — AI Assistant Context

> RightSpend is an AWS cost optimization tool by CloudFix that provides Commitment Free Discounts (CFDs) for EC2 — up to 55% savings without long-term commitments. Unlike competitors, RightSpend only charges for net new savings it actually delivers.

## Product

- **Name:** RightSpend (by CloudFix)
- **What:** Automated AWS EC2 cost optimization via Commitment Free Discounts (CFDs)
- **Savings:** 20-55% off EC2, same rates as 3-year Reserved Instances, no lock-in
- **Setup:** 15 minutes, read-only AWS integration
- **Pricing:** Performance-based — only pay for net new savings. If we don't save you money, you don't pay.
- **Marketplace:** Available on AWS Marketplace as RightSpend Flex
- **Website:** https://rightspend.ai

## Key Differentiators

- Only charges for **net new savings** (not existing RIs/Savings Plans)
- No 1-year or 3-year commitments — scale up/down hourly
- Works alongside existing Reserved Instances and Savings Plans
- Fully automated — zero manual management
- Rebalances every hour as usage changes

## Use Cases

- Enterprise AWS cost optimization
- FinOps automation and cost allocation
- EC2 Savings Plan optimization
- Reserved Instance replacement strategy
- AWS Marketplace procurement

## Company

- **Parent:** CloudFix (https://cloudfix.com)
- **Customers:** Ellucian ($5M annual savings), BCG ($75K/month), Zaxbys, Karma Automotive, Nu Skin
- **Contact:** https://cal.read.ai/bill-gleeson
